'''Phylo Gandish''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="pg" /> Her [[Gandish family|family]] owned a galactic transportation company. From [[Local year|years]] of travel, Gandish learned many loopholes in spaceport protocol.<ref name="ccg">{{CCG|set=Coruscant Limited|cardname=Phylo Gandish}}</ref> In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> she attended the celebration that united the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] and the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].<ref name="pg" /> A good-natured<ref name="ccg" /> woman,<ref name="pg" /> Gandish had light skin, [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and wore a pink outfit.<ref name="ccg" />

==Behind the scenes==
Phylo Gandish first appeared in the [[1999]]<ref name="Year">''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''</ref> [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. The character was played by an uncredited actor.<ref name="The Phantom Menace">{{Film|I}}</ref> The character was first identified in the [[2001]] ''[[Coruscant Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="ccg" />
